description: Characters of royal blood or noble station.
characters: A crowned ruler who bears the weight of a kingdom.
A crowned ruler whose word is law across the realm.
A royal heir whose destiny is yet to be written.
A royal heir navigating duty, expectation, and ambition.
A supreme ruler whose dominion spans many lands.
A supreme ruler who commands a vast empire.
A person of high birth and privilege in the feudal order.
